task_completion.description: The agent loaded the chest CT scan and displayed it in the axial view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface (or similar medical viewer) is visible with a chest CT scan loaded in the Red slice view (axial orientation).

task_completion.description: The agent placed a ruler to measure the maximum transverse cardiac diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal measurement line (ruler) is visible spanning the widest part of the heart (right atrium to left ventricle) in the axial view.

task_completion.description: The agent placed a ruler to measure the maximum internal thoracic diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal measurement line (ruler) is visible spanning the inner rib cage at its widest point in the axial view.

task_completion.description: Both the cardiac and thoracic measurements were taken at the same axial slice level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both measurement lines are visible simultaneously on the same slice, or the slice number/position indicator remains unchanged between the two measurement actions.

task_completion.description: The agent generated a JSON report with the measured diameters, calculated ratio, and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing a JSON object with keys 'cardiac_diameter_mm', 'thoracic_diameter_mm', 'ctr_ratio', and 'classification'. The ratio should mathematically correspond to the diameters shown.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the required markup files and the report JSON to the correct paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or save dialog showing the files 'cardiac_diameter.mrk.json', 'thoracic_diameter.mrk.json', and 'ctr_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's GUI tools (Markups/Ruler) for measurement rather than guessing or using terminal scripts without visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor interaction with the toolbar, specifically the ruler/markup tool, and interaction with the image view.

integrity.description: The values in the generated report match the measurements visible on the screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the 'Markups' module table or annotations on the image view correspond to the numbers written in the JSON report.

integrity.description: The agent did not access external files or internet resources to find the ground truth.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser windows or text editors opening 'ground_truth' files or searching for the specific Case ID online.
